top_signals.title: Japan, China lead foreign government retreat from U.S. Treasuries as Gulf War fallout stokes currency fears
top_signals.summary: The selloff came as the outbreak of the U.S.-Iran conflict and resulting surge in crude oil prices sent the Japanese yen and other Asian currencies tumbling.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
